title: Pie Delight Compat
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that adds placeable pies from many popular mods!
body:
### Pie Delight Compat

A Farmer's Delight Addon that adds placeable pies from other mods such as Oh The Biomes We've Gone and many more soon!
The mod adds compatible between Farmer's Delight & other popular mods pies to be placeable. 
It also made the vanilla pumpkin pies placeable as well!

### Compatibles 
The mod is compatible with 

- [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone), 
- [Hexalia](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexalia),
- [Paradise Lost](https://modrinth.com/mod/paradise-lost)

More compatibles will come soon...

### Support
This mod will support fabric only and I'll try my best to keep on updating this mod as I can.
